Name: departments_aggregate
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" LIMIT 3) SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base"), 'nodes', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') FROM (SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.base"."name" AS "name", "_root.base"."budget" AS "budget") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root")) AS "departments_aggregate"
